style_name: Turquoise Red Techno Manga Poster Style
summary: A retro techno-manga poster system with a cream paper ground, huge red display lettering, turquoise technical clothing or hardware, dense mechanical linework, annotation panels, cel-shaded figure drawing, and slightly faded printed texture.
negative_prompt: motorcycle, motorbike, bike wheel, motorcycle engine, license plate, original rider pose, exact source character, copied Japanese headline, copied signature, watermark, username, creator ID, app UI, back button icon, platform logo, QR code, photorealistic render, glossy 3D, clean vector art, cinematic background, deep perspective city, generic anime screenshot, low detail, plain white background, perfect typography

variables.SUBJECT: main illustrated subject, such as a technician, courier, repair worker, field researcher, designer, or compact service robot
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: clear action or pose that is not riding a motorcycle, such as calibrating, carrying, repairing, waiting, documenting, or balancing a device
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: new technical prop, device, kit, machine, container, tool, module, backpack, drone, instrument, or field apparatus
variables.LOCATION: implied poster setting or environment, such as transit depot, greenhouse lab, harbor workshop, rooftop weather station, compact studio, or spaceport service bay
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: oversized headline, cream negative space, technical callout panel, tiny labels, gauges, diagram boxes, accent bars, serial marks, and small interface fragments
variables.MAIN_TEXT: new oversized display headline, never copied from the reference
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small fictional labels, serial marks, diagram notes, and decorative micro text
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small lightning mark, dot, bar, circle seal, arrow, star, serial badge, or diagram icon
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: oversized turquoise jacket, workwear layers, gloves, boots, field vest, protective eyewear, scarf, or technical uniform details
variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: cream off-white poster background, huge red-orange block headline, turquoise main mass, large manga-style subject, flat cel shading, dense mechanical linework, annotation boxes, limited retro print palette, faded screenprint grain
variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: motorcycle rider, motorbike wheel or engine, source character, source pose, copied Japanese headline, signature, watermark, app UI, platform icon, QR code, or direct source-image variant

variables.SUBJECT: compact weather-station courier in an oversized turquoise utility coat
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: calibrating a portable rooftop weather kit while balancing a folded tripod case
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: portable weather station with gauges, cables, sensor mast, warm gray panels, red-orange seals, straps, and tiny serial labels
variables.LOCATION: rooftop service platform implied through technical labels, not a realistic skyline
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: cream off-white printed paper, huge red-orange custom block headline, one thin tan annotation panel, small gauges, diagram boxes, and fictional technical labels
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: teal workwear coat, gloves, utility belt, chunky boots, and protective neck scarf

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 image in the "Turquoise Red Techno Manga Poster Style". Subject: compact weather-station courier in an oversized turquoise utility coat. Action: kneeling beside a portable rooftop weather kit and tightening a cable clamp. Prop/Product: portable weather station with gauges, cables, sensor mast, warm gray panels, red-orange seals, straps, and tiny serial labels. Location: abstract rooftop service platform shown as cream poster space with a few diagram lines. Background: giant red-orange custom block headline reading "SKYSHIFT" stretches across the upper half, with two thin tan annotation panels, fictional micro labels "LOW WIND / UNIT 07 / SENSOR LOG", serial tabs, small arrows, and a lightning badge. Keep the subject and kit across the lower center, large enough to dominate the banner. Use flat cel-shaded manga linework, turquoise hardware and clothing, warm gray mechanics, black contour lines, red-orange accents, aged paper grain, subtle halftone, faded ink, and off-register print texture. Avoid motorcycles, motorbike wheels, copied source character, copied Japanese headline, watermark, platform UI, QR code, photorealism, glossy 3D, clean vector art, or cinematic background. Generate as a 4K ultra-high-resolution raster image.
